title: Custom Death Messages
body:
This mod adds data-driven custom death messages that replace the vanilla ones and are chosen at random.

It is completely server side and uses the [Server Translations API](https://github.com/NucleoidMC/Server-Translations) to achieve that

![Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6760a7f49d3e8a4ab2675a6c51519a2b22b4559c.png)
